tagline: Family-run auto shop on Magnolia Boulevard, Burbank.

hero.heading: The Magnolia auto shop that gets it right.
hero.subheading: A family-run garage on Magnolia between Buena Vista and California. Two lifts, twenty years deep, written quotes on every job. We do brakes, oil, suspension, AC, and diagnostic — no upsells, ever.

about.label: The shop
about.heading: Two lifts. Twenty years. No upsells.
paragraphs: Julian's Automotive has been on Magnolia Boulevard since 2005. Two lifts, a senior technician on every job, and a service writer who answers his own phone.

We do day-one repairs and routine maintenance — brakes, oil, fluids, tires, alignment, suspension, AC service, and computer diagnostic. Anything more specialized we refer to a trusted friend's shop down the road.
Closed Sundays. Written quote on every job before we touch a wrench. Cash or card, same price.

services.title: Diagnostic
services.description: Full OBD scan, live data, road test if needed. Printed report. Free with any repair we perform.

services.title: Brakes
services.description: Pads, rotors, calipers, fluid. Spec-matched friction. Bedded-in on the road before delivery.

services.title: Oil + 20-Point
services.description: Synthetic-blend or full-synthetic, OEM filter, top-offs, documented 20-point inspection.

services.title: Tires + Alignment
services.description: Four tires mounted and balanced plus four-wheel alignment. Michelin, Continental, Falken.

services.title: Suspension
services.description: Struts, shocks, control arms, bushings. Four-wheel alignment after every install.

services.title: AC Service
services.description: Diagnostic, leak check, evac-and-recharge. EPA-certified. Get it done before summer.

reviews.name: Robert M.
reviews.text: Julian's has been the shop for both my cars since I moved to Burbank. Never recommended a service I didn't need and never missed one I did. The bill is always exactly what was quoted.

reviews.name: Carlos D.
reviews.text: Brought in what I thought was a transmission job. Julian diagnosed it as a sixty-dollar mount, did the work the same afternoon, saved me a fifteen-hundred-dollar repair. Real shop.

reviews.name: Patty N.
reviews.text: Walked in for a brake job and walked out feeling like I'd met three friends. Julian's is family-run and it feels like a family. Safer than any chain in Burbank.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Julian's Automotive, 4303 Magnolia Blvd, Burbank, CA 91505

seo.title: Julian's Automotive — Magnolia Blvd auto shop in Burbank since 2005
seo.description: A family-run auto shop on Magnolia Blvd in Burbank. Diagnostic, brakes, oil, tires, suspension, AC. Written quotes free, no upsells.
